## Task input
# Fix Buttons

In settings, there are "Browse" and "Close" buttons. They look different than other buttons in the interface (e.g., text size and text vertical alignment).

Make a central component to handle all buttons. Call it something like CommonButton (it should allow for minor deviations, such as primary/secondary or whatever naming you come up with). If there are other specialty buttons in the UI (e.g., the stages look like they might be buttons, and the task list might have buttons, and the activity tabs might be buttons), then those specialty buttons should each get their own component type if they aren't already one.

There should be a central place with all the custom button components. There should be an automated test that prevents normal buttons from appearing anywhere except this central place for the buttons.

A non-exhaustive list of things to consider for common buttons:

- Account for the grey buttons (e.g., "Cancel"), the blue buttons (e.g., "Run All" and "Create Task"), and the yellow buttons (e.g., "Pause After Task").
- Account for the various button states.
- Decide what to do with buttons like "Settings" that seem to have some sort of glyph within the button.


Decide what to do with the buttons that have no text (e.g., section expand, collapse, and status). Those seem to have special styling, so maybe they're another special button component or two.

## Stage 1 - Ideate

{
  "summary": "Refactor all button-like elements into a centralized button component system under `components/buttons/`. A single `CommonButton` primitive handles variant/style/state, while specialty buttons (IconButton, SettingsButton, StagePill, ActivityTab, TaskListButton) are thin wrappers or factory-created exports. An ESLint rule bans bare `<button>` elements outside the buttons directory.",
  "options": [
    "Option A — Atomic component hierarchy: one folder, one component per visual pattern (CommonButton, IconButton, SettingsButton, StagePill, ActivityTab, TaskListButton), CSS Modules for scoping, ESLint rule banning bare <button> outside the buttons directory.",
    "Option B — Compound component + design tokens: CommonButton exposes sub-components (.Primary, .Secondary, .Warning, .Ghost, .Glyph); design tokens drive all sizing/color; specialty components import tokens but render own markup; ESLint + Jest transform guard.",
    "Option C — Polymorphic factory + closed wrappers: one CommonButton primitive taking variant, size, icon, polymorphic `as` props; a `createButton(defaults)` factory produces named specialty buttons in one line; barrel export from index.js; ESLint + Babel plugin guard."
  ]

## Stage 4 - Plan

{
  "plan": "## Plan: fix-buttons — Centralized Button Component System\n\n### Architecture\nCreate a single directory `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/Buttons/` holding every custom button type. Every new component **extends `Avalonia.Controls.Button`** so all existing tests that use `FindControl<Button>(…)`, `.OfType<Button>()`, or `sender is Button` continue to work without changes.\n\n### Component design\n\n**1. `CommonButton` (extends `Button`)** — general-purpose text button\n- Styled property `Appearance` enum: `Default` (grey), `Primary` (blue), `Warning` (yellow), `Hyperlink` (transparent link), `Path` (dark folder-path).\n- On `Appearance` change, sets the matching Avalonia style class (`Classes.Set(\"primary\", …)` etc.) so the existing theme selectors (`Button.primary`, `Button.warning`, …) match without theme changes.\n- Styled property `Glyph` (string?): when set, prepends a `TextBlock` inside a horizontal `StackPanel` alongside `Content`, replacing the old inline-⚙ pattern.\n- Exposes no ad-hoc `Padding`/`FontSize`/`MinHeight` overrides — sizing is governed solely by the theme style, eliminating the original inconsistency.\n\n**2. `IconButton` (extends `Button`)** — icon-only toggle button\n- Styled property `IconStyle` enum: `CollapseToggle` (26×26 chevron), `FocusToggle` (34×30 fullscreen arrows).\n- On `IconStyle` change, sets the matching style class (`collapseToggle` / `focusToggle`) so existing theme selectors match.\n- Built-in composition: when `IconStyle` is set, the control auto-creates the appropriate `ChevronIcon` or `FocusToggleIcon` child and binds its properties from the `DataContext` (e.g. `Direction`, `IsContracted`).\n\n**3. `StageCardButton` (extends `Button`)** — stage card in the stage board\n- Sets `Classes.Add(\"stageButton\")` in its constructor.\n- No extra properties; rich child content is provided via the existing `DataTemplate` in `StageBoard.axaml`.\n\n### Theme (`VisualRelayTheme.axaml`)\n- All existing `Button.primary` / `Button.warning` / `Button.hyperlink` / `Button.path` / `Button.stageButton` / `Button.collapseToggle` / `Button.focusToggle` selectors are **preserved** — the new subclasses inherit them.\n- The base `Button` selector padding `14,8` / `MinHeight=36` applies to all new components as the consistent default.\n- No new theme selectors are strictly required (the components auto-apply style classes), but the plan optionally tidies removed inline-override artifacts.\n\n### Migration of raw `<Button>` instances\nEvery raw `<Button>` in the 15+ `.axaml` files is replaced with the appropriate component:\n- `<Button Classes=\"primary\" Content=\"Run All\" …/>` → `<local:CommonButton Appearance=\"Primary\" Content=\"Run All\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"warning\" Content=\"{Binding PauseButtonText}\" …/>` → `<local:CommonButton Appearance=\"Warning\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"hyperlink\" …/>` → `<local:CommonButton Appearance=\"Hyperlink\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"path\" …/>` → `<local:CommonButton Appearance=\"Path\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"collapseToggle\" …><controls:ChevronIcon …/></Button>` → `<local:IconButton IconStyle=\"CollapseToggle\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"focusToggle\" …><controls:FocusToggleIcon …/></Button>` → `<local:IconButton IconStyle=\"FocusToggle\" …/>`\n- `<Button Classes=\"stageButton\" …>…</Button>` → `<local:StageCardButton …>…</local:StageCardButton>`\n- `<Button Content=\"⚙ Settings\" …><StackPanel>…</StackPanel></Button>` → `<local:CommonButton Glyph=\"⚙\" Content=\"Settings\" …/>`\n\n**Specific fixes for the originally-reported buttons:**\n- **Settings \"Close\"** (line 28 of `SettingsWindow.axaml`): `Padding=\"14,5\"` → removed; inherits theme default `Padding=\"14,8\"` via `CommonButton`.\n- **Obsidian \"Browse\"** (line 23-24 of `ObsidianSettings.axaml`): `FontSize=\"11\" Padding=\"6,3\"` → removed; inherits theme defaults.\n\n**`CreateConfirmButton` factory** (`App.axaml.cs` line 76-94): reimplemented to return a `CommonButton` with `Appearance=\"Primary\"` and its existing size properties (`Height=32`, `MinWidth=80`, `Padding=(12,0)`, `VerticalContentAlignment=Center`). The confirmation-dialog Cancel button (line 132-137) also uses `CommonButton`.\n\n### Automated guard test\nNew file `tests/VisualRelay.Tests/ButtonsCentralizationTests.cs`:\n1. **XAML scan**: `File.ReadAllText` on every `*.axaml` under `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/`. Asserts that `<Button` (case-insensitive, as a regex on opening tags) appears **only** inside `Views/Controls/Buttons/` and in the `App.axaml` itself (which may reference the base type in a style). Any raw `<Button` outside the Buttons directory fails the test with the file path and line context.\n2. **Code-behind scan**: `File.ReadAllText` on every `*.cs` under `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/`. Asserts that `new Button` or `new Button(` appears **only** inside `Views/Controls/Buttons/` and in `App.axaml.cs` (for the confirmation dialog).\n\n### Impact on existing tests\nBecause `CommonButton`, `IconButton`, and `StageCardButton` all extend `Button`:\n- `FindControl<Button>(\"MarkDoneButton\")` still works.\n- `.GetVisualDescendants().OfType<Button>()` still returns the new components.\n- `sender is Button` in click handlers still matches.\n- `TaskActionBarLayoutTests`, `InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests`, `TaskDetailRemoveButtonLayoutTests`, `TaskDetailAttachmentRevealButtonLayoutTests`, `SettingsPanelUiTests`, `KeySetupPanelUiTests`, `ConfigInitEmptyStateUiTests` all require **no code changes**.\n- `ConfirmationDialogButtonAlignmentTests` is updated to call the revised `CreateConfirmButton` (which now returns `CommonButton`) and to assert on the `CommonButton.Appearance` property.",

             x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel">

                          Padding="10,4"
                          MinHeight="26"
                          IsVisible="{Binding CanRewriteSelectedPublic}"/>

                Spacing="6"

      <ProgressBar IsIndeterminate="True"
                   Width="16"
                   Height="16"
                   VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
      <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedTaskRewriteElapsed}"
                 FontSize="11"
                 Foreground="#8FE3A2"
                 VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
      <buttons:CommonButton Content="Cancel"
                            Command="{Binding CancelRewriteSelectedCommand}"
                            Padding="10,4"
                            MinHeight="26"/>

    <!-- Done with undo: Revert button -->
    <buttons:CommonButton Content="Revert"
                          Command="{Binding RevertRewriteSelectedCommand}"
                          Padding="10,4"
                          MinHeight="26"
                          IsVisible="{Binding SelectedTaskHasRewriteUndo}"/>
  </StackPanel>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:VisualRelay.App.ViewModels"
             xmlns:controls="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls"
             xmlns:buttons="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.Buttons"
             x:Class="VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.TopBar"
             x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel">
  <Border Background="#101218"
          BorderBrush="#252A33"
          BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
          Padding="10">
    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto"
           ColumnSpacing="10">
      <Grid ColumnDefinitions="36,Auto"
            ColumnSpacing="10"
            VerticalAlignment="Center"
            Margin="2,0,8,0">
        <Border Width="34"
                Height="34"
                CornerRadius="8"
                Background="#5575F2"
                BoxShadow="0 10 24 0 #665575F2">
          <TextBlock Text="VR"
                     HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     FontWeight="Bold"
                     Foreground="#FFFFFF"/>
        </Border>
        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center">
          <TextBlock Text="Visual Relay"
                     FontSize="14"
                     FontWeight="SemiBold"
                     Foreground="#F2F5FA"/>
          <TextBlock Text="task pipeline"
                     FontSize="11"
                     Foreground="#7F8794"/>
          <TextBlock Text="{Binding Version}"
                     FontSize="10"
                     Foreground="#5A6370"/>
        </StackPanel>
      </Grid>

      <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="1"
                            Appearance="Path"
                            Command="{Binding BrowseCommand}">
        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*"
              ColumnSpacing="10"
              ClipToBounds="True">
          <TextBlock Text="FOLDER"
                     FontSize="11"
                     FontWeight="Bold"
                     Foreground="#7F8794"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
          <TextBlock Grid.Column="1"
                     Text="{Binding RootName}"
                     FontWeight="SemiBold"
                     Foreground="#E7ECF3"
                     MaxLines="1"
                     TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
          <TextBlock Grid.Column="2"
                     Text="{Binding RootParentPath, Converter={x:Static controls:HomePathToTildeConverter.Instance}}"
                     FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                     FontSize="12"
                     Foreground="#9AA3B1"
                     MaxLines="1"
                     TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
        </Grid>
      </buttons:CommonButton>

      <StackPanel Grid.Column="2"
                  Orientation="Horizontal"
                  Spacing="8"
                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                  ToolTip.Tip="{Binding BackendStatusMessage}">
        <Ellipse Width="9"
                  Height="9"
                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                  Fill="{Binding BackendStatusBrush}"/>
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding BackendStatusLabel}"
                   FontSize="11"
                   Foreground="#9AA3B1"
                   VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
        <buttons:CommonButton Content="Start"
                              Padding="8,2"
                              FontSize="11"
                              VerticalAlignment="Center"
                              Command="{Binding StartBackendCommand}"
                              IsVisible="{Binding !IsBackendReachable}"/>
      </StackPanel>

      <!-- Settings button — opens the settings modal dialog (no flyout, so no
           nested FlyoutPresenter scrollbar competing with the panel's own). -->
      <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3"
                            x:Name="SettingsButton"
                            Glyph="⚙"
                            Content="Settings"
                            Padding="6,4"
                            VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Click="OnSettingsClick"/>

      <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="4"
                            Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
                            Content="Refresh"/>
      <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="5"
                            Appearance="Warning"
                            Command="{Binding TogglePauseCommand}"
                            Content="{Binding PauseButtonText}"
                            Background="{Binding PauseButtonBackground}"
                            BorderBrush="{Binding PauseButtonBorderBrush}"
                            Foreground="{Binding PauseButtonForeground}"
                            ToolTip.Tip="Finishes the current task, then stops before the next queued task."/>
      <Border Grid.Column="6"
              Classes="chip"
              MaxWidth="180"
              IsVisible="{Binding IsPauseNoticeVisible}">
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding PauseNoticeText}"
                   FontSize="11"
                   Foreground="#F0CA66"
                   MaxLines="1"
                   TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
      </Border>
      <ComboBox Grid.Column="7"
                ItemsSource="{Binding RunAllModeOptions}"
                SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRunAllMode}"
                MinWidth="110"
                VerticalAlignment="Center"
                ToolTip.Tip="Run All mode: Standard (parallel planning) or Sequential (one at a time)"/>
      <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="8"
                            Appearance="Primary"
                            Command="{Binding DrainQueueCommand}"
                            Content="Run All"/>
    </Grid>
  </Border>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:VisualRelay.App.ViewModels"
             xmlns:controls="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls"
             xmlns:buttons="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.Buttons"
             x:Class="VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.QueuePanel"
             x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel">
  <Border Classes="panel"
          ClipToBounds="True">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
      <Grid Row="0"
            RowDefinitions="Auto"
            Margin="16,15,16,12">
        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*,Auto,Auto,Auto"
              ColumnSpacing="8">
          <TextBlock Grid.Column="0"
                     Text="{Binding TaskListTitle}"
                     Classes="panelTitle"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
          <Border Grid.Column="1"
                  Classes="chip"
                  Padding="8,3">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Tasks.Count}"
                       FontSize="11"
                       Foreground="#C8CED8"/>
          </Border>
          <!-- Grid.Column="2" is the * spacer that absorbs slack -->
          <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3"
                                Command="{Binding OpenNewTaskDialogCommand}"
                                Padding="10,4"
                                MinHeight="28"
                                Content="New"/>
          <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="4"
                                Command="{Binding ToggleArchiveCommand}"
                                Padding="10,4"
                                MinHeight="28"
                                Content="{Binding TaskListToggleText}"/>
          <buttons:IconButton Grid.Column="5"
                              IconStyle="CollapseToggle"
                              ChevronDirection="{Binding QueueChevron}"
                              Command="{Binding ToggleQueueCommand}"
                              ToolTip.Tip="{Binding QueueHeaderTooltip}"
                              VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>

      <ListBox Grid.Row="1"
               x:Name="TaskQueueList"
               Margin="10,0,10,8"
               DragDrop.AllowDrop="True"
               IsVisible="{Binding !NeedsInitialization}"
               ItemsSource="{Binding Tasks}"
               SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedTask}">
         <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
          <DataTemplate DataType="{x:Type vm:TaskRowViewModel}">
             <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
              <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding DayHeader}" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                         Foreground="#5A6270" Margin="12,8,12,2"
                         IsVisible="{Binding DayHeader, Converter={x:Static StringConverters.IsNotNullOrEmpty}}"/>
              <Border Grid.Row="1" Padding="0" Classes="queueCard" MinHeight="76"
                      Background="{Binding CardBackgroundBrush}" BorderBrush="{Binding BorderBrush}"
                      BorderThickness="{Binding CardBorderThickness}" BoxShadow="{Binding CardShadow}">
                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="4,*">
                <Border Classes="selectionRail"
                        Background="{Binding RailBrush}"
                        CornerRadius="8,0,0,8"/>
                <Grid Grid.Column="1"
                      RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,*"
                      Margin="8,12,12,12">
                  <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*"
                        ColumnSpacing="8">
                    <Ellipse Width="7"
                             Height="7"
                             Fill="{Binding AccentBrush}"
                             VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1"
                               Text="{Binding Id}"
                               FontWeight="SemiBold"
                               Foreground="#E7ECF3"
                               MaxLines="1"
                               TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                  </Grid>
                  <TextBlock Grid.Row="1"
                             Text="{Binding MarkdownPath, Converter={x:Static controls:HomePathToTildeConverter.Instance}}"
                             FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                             FontSize="11"
                             Foreground="#6F7785"
                             Margin="15,6,0,0"
                             MaxLines="1"
                             TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                  <Grid Grid.Row="2"
                        ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*"
                        ColumnSpacing="8"
                        Margin="15,6,0,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding StateLabel}"
                               FontSize="11"
                               FontWeight="SemiBold"
                               Foreground="{Binding AccentBrush}"
                               MaxLines="1"/>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1"
                               Text="{Binding ReviewReason}"
                               ToolTip.Tip="{Binding ReviewReason}"
                               FontSize="11"
                               Foreground="#F2C66D"
                               MaxLines="1"
                               TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                  </Grid>
                  <TextBlock Grid.Row="3"
                             Text="{Binding MetricsLine}"
                             FontSize="11"
                             Foreground="#8E96A3"
                             Margin="15,5,0,0"
                             MaxLines="1"
                             TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                  <ProgressBar Grid.Row="4"
                               Height="3"
                               MinHeight="3"
                               Padding="0"
                               Margin="15,10,0,0"
                               VerticalAlignment="Top"
                               Minimum="0"
                               Maximum="1"
                               Value="{Binding ProgressFraction}"
                               Background="#222833"
                               Foreground="{Binding AccentBrush}"
                               CornerRadius="3"/>
                </Grid>
              </Grid>
            </Border>
            </Grid>
          </DataTemplate>
        </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
      </ListBox>

      <Border Grid.Row="1"
              x:Name="InitEmptyState"
              Margin="16"
              Padding="16"
              VerticalAlignment="Top"
              Background="#1B2129"
              BorderBrush="#2C333E"
              BorderThickness="1"
              CornerRadius="8"
              IsVisible="{Binding NeedsInitialization}">
        <StackPanel Spacing="10">
          <TextBlock Text="Initialize this project" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3"/>
          <TextBlock Text="No .relay/config.json here yet. Set the command Visual Relay should run to test changes, then create the config."
                     TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="12" Foreground="#8E96A3"/>
          <TextBox x:Name="InitTestCommandBox"
                   Text="{Binding InitTestCommandInput}"
                   PlaceholderText="e.g. dotnet test"
                   ToolTip.Tip="Examples: dotnet test, pytest, npm test, cargo test, go test ./..."
                   FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"/>
          <StackPanel Spacing="8">
            <buttons:CommonButton x:Name="CreateConfigButton"
                                  Command="{Binding CreateConfigCommand}"
                                  Appearance="Primary"
                                  Padding="12,6"
                                  HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                  Content="Create config"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding FindTestCommandCommand}"
                                  Padding="12,6"
                                  HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                  Content="Find it for me"
                                  ToolTip.Tip="Ask the frontier model to infer the test command (requires the model backend)"/>
          </StackPanel>
          <TextBlock Text="— or starting from an empty folder? —"
                     HorizontalAlignment="Center" FontSize="11" Foreground="#6B7480"/>
          <TextBlock Text="Initialize a git repo and a placeholder test command so the first task can scaffold the project. Visual Relay adopts the real test command once a toolchain appears."
                     TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="12" Foreground="#8E96A3"/>
          <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding BootstrapProjectCommand}"
                                Padding="12,6"
                                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                Content="Set up empty project"
                                ToolTip.Tip="git init (if needed) + a runnable .relay/config.json + the pre-commit authority hook"/>
        </StackPanel>
      </Border>

      <Border Grid.Row="1"
              Margin="16"
              Padding="14"
              VerticalAlignment="Top"
              Background="#2A1B1E"
              BorderBrush="#7A2A30"
              BorderThickness="1"
              CornerRadius="8"
              IsVisible="{Binding HasConfigDiagnostic}">
        <StackPanel Spacing="6">
          <TextBlock Text="This project's .relay/config.json could not be read"
                     FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#F0B6BC"/>
          <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConfigDiagnostic}"
                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                     FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                     FontSize="12"
                     Foreground="#D9A0A6"/>
        </StackPanel>
      </Border>

      <Border Grid.Row="2"
              Background="#1B2028"
              BorderBrush="#252A33"
              BorderThickness="0,1,0,0"
              Padding="14"
              IsVisible="{Binding ShowHfGate}">
        <StackPanel Spacing="8">
          <TextBlock Text="{Binding HfGateMessage}"
                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                     FontWeight="SemiBold"
                     Foreground="#F0CA66"
                     FontSize="12"/>
          <TextBlock Text="{Binding HfPricingNote}"
                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                     FontSize="11"
                     Foreground="#8E96A3"/>
          <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                CommandParameter="https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens"
                                Padding="10,4"
                                MinHeight="28"
                                Content="Get a free token →"/>
          <TextBlock Text="or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar"
                     FontSize="11"
                     Foreground="#8E96A3"
                     TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
        </StackPanel>
      </Border>

      <Border Grid.Row="2"
              BorderBrush="#252A33"
              BorderThickness="0,1,0,0"
              Padding="16,12"
              IsVisible="{Binding !ShowHfGate}">
        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" ColumnSpacing="6">
          <TextBlock Text="{Binding StatusText}"
                     ToolTip.Tip="{Binding StatusText}"
                     Foreground="#8FE3A2"
                     MaxLines="4"
                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                     VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
          <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="1"
                                x:Name="StatusExpandButton"
                                Padding="4,2"
                                MinHeight="0"
                                MinWidth="0"
                                FontSize="11"
                                VerticalAlignment="Top"
                                ToolTip.Tip="View full status"
                                IsVisible="{Binding StatusText, Converter={x:Static StringConverters.IsNotNullOrEmpty}}">
            <buttons:CommonButton.Flyout>
              <Flyout Placement="TopEdgeAlignedRight">
                <Border Background="#1B2028"
                        BorderBrush="#3A4150"
                        BorderThickness="1"
                        CornerRadius="8"
                        Padding="14,12"
                        Width="340"
                        MaxHeight="320">
                  <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*" RowSpacing="6"
                        VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
                    <TextBlock Text="STATUS"
                               Foreground="#5A6270"
                               FontSize="11"
                               FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1"
                                  MaxHeight="280"
                                  VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                                  HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
                      <SelectableTextBlock Text="{Binding StatusText}"
                                           Foreground="#8FE3A2"
                                           FontSize="12"
                                           LineHeight="18"
                                           TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                  </Grid>
                </Border>
              </Flyout>
            </buttons:CommonButton.Flyout>
            <TextBlock Text="⤢" Foreground="#5A6270" FontSize="11"/>
          </buttons:CommonButton>
        </Grid>
      </Border>
    </Grid>
  </Border>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:VisualRelay.App.ViewModels"
             xmlns:controls="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls"
             xmlns:buttons="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.Buttons"
             x:Class="VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.TaskDetailPanel"
             x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel">
  <Border Classes="panel"
          ClipToBounds="True">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
      <Border Grid.Row="0"
              BorderBrush="#252A33"
              BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
              Padding="16,14">
        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
              RowSpacing="10">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
            <TextBlock Text="TASK"
                       Classes="panelTitle"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
             <controls:TaskActionBar Grid.Column="1"/>
          </Grid>

          <Border Grid.Row="1"
                  IsVisible="{Binding IsViewingDifferentTaskDuringRun}"
                  Background="#17233D"
                  BorderBrush="#3191FF"
                  BorderThickness="1"
                  CornerRadius="8"
                  Padding="10,7">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="10">
              <TextBlock Text="{Binding ViewingRunContextText}"
                         Foreground="#C7D4FF"
                         FontSize="12"
                         FontWeight="SemiBold"
                         VerticalAlignment="Center"
                         MaxLines="1"
                         TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="1"
                                    Command="{Binding FollowRunningTaskCommand}"
                                    Content="Go To"
                                    Padding="10,4"
                                    MinHeight="26"/>
            </Grid>
          </Border>

          <CheckBox Grid.Row="2"
                    IsChecked="{Binding SelectedTaskBoostsTurns}"
                    Content="{Binding TurnBudgetLabel}"
                    ToolTip.Tip="Use for unusually large tasks. Multiplies the default per-stage turn limit by 10 for this task only."
                    IsEnabled="{Binding CanToggleTurnBudget}"
                    FontSize="12"
                    Foreground="#C7D4FF"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
        </Grid>
      </Border>

      <Grid Grid.Row="1"
            RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Grid.Row="0"
                IsVisible="{Binding HasSelectedTaskError}"
                Background="#2A1715"
                BorderBrush="#F36F63"
                BorderThickness="1"
                CornerRadius="8"
                Margin="16,12,16,4"
                Padding="12,10"
                MaxHeight="200"
                ClipToBounds="True">
          <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*" RowSpacing="6">
            <TextBlock Text="LATEST RUN FAILED"
                       Foreground="#F36F63"
                       FontSize="11"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
            <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
              <SelectableTextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedTaskError}"
                                   Foreground="#F4B5AE"
                                   FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                                   FontSize="12"
                                   LineHeight="18"
                                   TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
            </ScrollViewer>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <TabControl Grid.Row="1"
                    Margin="16,4,16,16"
                    SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedTabIndex}">
          <TabItem Header="Markdown">
            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
              <!-- Read-only toolbar -->
              <Border Grid.Row="0"
                      Padding="8,4"
                      IsVisible="{Binding IsMarkdownReadOnly}">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                  <controls:RewriteToolbar/>
                  <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding EditSelectedTaskCommand}"
                                        Padding="10,4"
                                        MinHeight="26"
                                        Content="Edit"
                                        ToolTip.Tip="{Binding EditBlockedReason}"/>
                  <TextBlock Text="{Binding EditBlockedReason}"
                             IsVisible="{Binding HasEditBlockedReason}"
                             FontSize="11"
                             Foreground="#F2C66D"
                             VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                </StackPanel>
              </Border>
              <!-- Edit toolbar -->
              <Border Grid.Row="0"
                      Padding="8,4"
                      IsVisible="{Binding IsEditingMarkdown}">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                  <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding SaveEditCommand}"
                                        Appearance="Primary"
                                        Padding="10,4"
                                        MinHeight="26"
                                        Content="Save"/>
                  <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding CancelEditCommand}"
                                        Padding="10,4"
                                        MinHeight="26"
                                        Content="Cancel"/>
                </StackPanel>
              </Border>
              <!-- New-task toolbar -->
              <Border Grid.Row="0"
                      Padding="8,4"
                      IsVisible="{Binding IsNewTaskDialogOpen}">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                  <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding CreateNewTaskCommand}"
                                        Appearance="Primary"
                                        Padding="10,4"
                                        MinHeight="26"
                                        Content="Create task"/>
                  <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding OpenNewTaskDialogCommand}"
                                        Padding="10,4"
                                        MinHeight="26"
                                        Content="Cancel"/>
                </StackPanel>
              </Border>

              <!-- Read-only view -->
              <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,*"
                    IsVisible="{Binding IsMarkdownReadOnly}">
                <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" Padding="8,14,8,8"
                              HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
                  <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedTaskMarkdown}"
                             FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace" FontSize="13"
                             LineHeight="21" Foreground="#DCE2EA" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                </ScrollViewer>
              </Grid>
              <!-- Edit view -->
              <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,*"
                    IsVisible="{Binding IsEditingMarkdown}" Margin="4">
                <TextBox Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding EditTitleBuffer}"
                         PlaceholderText="Task title (required)"
                         FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace" FontSize="13"
                         Foreground="#DCE2EA" Background="#141820" BorderBrush="#2A303A"
                         BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding EditBuffer}"
                         AcceptsReturn="True"
                         FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace" FontSize="13"
                         Foreground="#DCE2EA" Background="#141820" BorderBrush="#2A303A"
                         BorderThickness="1" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
              </Grid>

              <!-- New-task view -->
              <Grid Grid.Row="1"
                    RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                    IsVisible="{Binding IsNewTaskDialogOpen}"
                    Margin="4">
                <TextBox Text="{Binding NewTaskTitle}"
                         PlaceholderText="Task title (required)"
                         FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                         FontSize="13"
                         Foreground="#DCE2EA"
                         Background="#141820"
                         BorderBrush="#2A303A"
                         BorderThickness="1"
                         Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Row="1"
                         Text="{Binding NewTaskBody}"
                         PlaceholderText="Initial markdown body (optional)"
                         AcceptsReturn="True"
                         FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                         FontSize="13"
                         Foreground="#DCE2EA"
                         Background="#141820"
                         BorderBrush="#2A303A"
                         BorderThickness="1"
                         TextWrapping="Wrap"
                         Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Row="2"
                           Text="{Binding NewTaskError}"
                           IsVisible="{Binding NewTaskError, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}"
                           FontSize="11"
                           Foreground="#F36F63"
                           TextWrapping="Wrap"
                           Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
              </Grid>
            </Grid>
          </TabItem>
          <TabItem Header="Context">
            <ScrollViewer Padding="8,18,8,8"
                          HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
              <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedTaskContext}"
                         FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                         FontSize="13"
                         LineHeight="21"
                         Foreground="#DCE2EA"
                         TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
            </ScrollViewer>
          </TabItem>
          <TabItem Header="Attachments">
            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
              <Border Grid.Row="0"
                      Padding="8,8,8,4">
                <buttons:CommonButton Command="{Binding AddAttachmentsCommand}"
                                      Appearance="Primary"
                                      Padding="10,4"
                                      MinHeight="26"
                                      Content="Add Attachment…"/>
              </Border>
              <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1"
                            Padding="8,4,8,8"
                            HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
                <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Attachments}">
                  <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate DataType="{x:Type vm:AttachmentRowViewModel}">
                      <Border Padding="4,3,10,3"
                              Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <DockPanel>
                          <buttons:CommonButton DockPanel.Dock="Right"
                                                Command="{Binding RemoveCommand}"
                                                Padding="6,2"
                                                MinHeight="22"
                                                FontSize="11"
                                                Content="Remove"/>
                          <buttons:CommonButton DockPanel.Dock="Right"
                                                Command="{Binding RevealCommand}"
                                                Padding="6,2"
                                                MinHeight="22"
                                                FontSize="11"
                                                Margin="6,0,6,0"
                                                Content="Reveal"/>
                          <TextBlock Text="{Binding Path, Converter={x:Static controls:HomePathToTildeConverter.Instance}}"
                                     FontFamily="Menlo,Consolas,monospace"
                                     FontSize="12"
                                     Foreground="#C8CED8"
                                     VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                     MaxLines="1"
                                     TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                        </DockPanel>
                      </Border>
                    </DataTemplate>
                  </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                </ItemsControl>
              </ScrollViewer>
            </Grid>
          </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
      </Grid>
    </Grid>
  </Border>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:VisualRelay.App.ViewModels"
             xmlns:controls="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls"
             xmlns:cfg="using:VisualRelay.Core.Configuration"
             xmlns:buttons="using:VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.Buttons"
             x:Class="VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls.SettingsPanel"
             x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel"
             x:Name="Root">
  <Border Background="#1A1E26"
          BorderBrush="#2A3040"
          BorderThickness="1"
          CornerRadius="8"
          Padding="16">
    <ScrollViewer x:Name="SettingsScrollViewer"
                  HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled"
                  VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
      <StackPanel Spacing="6">
        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
          <TextBlock Text="Settings"
                     FontSize="16"
                     FontWeight="SemiBold"
                     Foreground="#F2F5FA"
                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
          <buttons:CommonButton x:Name="RevealSettingsFileButton"
                                Grid.Column="2"
                                Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                Command="{Binding RevealSettingsFileCommand}">
            <TextBlock Text="Show in Finder" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
          </buttons:CommonButton>
        </Grid>

        <Border Background="#12151C"
                BorderBrush="#252A33"
                BorderThickness="1"
                CornerRadius="4"
                Padding="10">
          <StackPanel Spacing="6">
            <CheckBox x:Name="CommitProofCheckBox"
                      IsChecked="{Binding CommitProofArtifacts}"
                      Foreground="#E7ECF3"
                      FontSize="13">
              Commit Visual Relay's run proof to this repo
            </CheckBox>
            <TextBlock Text="Forces the .relay/ seal, ledger, manifest, and status files into each commit so every run stays verifiable even though .relay/ is gitignored. Uncheck to keep Visual Relay's run files out of your commits."
                       FontSize="11"
                       Foreground="#9AA3B1"
                       TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
          </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <Border Background="#12151C" BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4" Padding="10">
          <StackPanel Spacing="6">
            <CheckBox x:Name="VerboseDiagnosticsCheckBox"
                      IsChecked="{Binding VerboseSandboxDiagnostics}"
                      Foreground="#E7ECF3" FontSize="13">
              Verbose sandbox diagnostics
            </CheckBox>
            <TextBlock Text="Off (default) keeps the sandbox quiet so only your command's output is captured. Turn on for the sandbox's full diagnostics when debugging a sandbox or Visual Relay issue — output-only, it never weakens the sandbox."
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#9AA3B1" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
          </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- Provider keys section -->
        <TextBlock Text="Provider Keys"
                   FontSize="16"
                   FontWeight="SemiBold"
                   Foreground="#F2F5FA"/>

        <!-- Per-provider rows. Each row binds to KeyStates[i] so FindControl
             can locate named controls without crossing a DataTemplate boundary. -->

        <!-- HF row (index 0) -->
        <Border BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="0,5">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="10"
                RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#5AD47D" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[0].IsSet}"/>
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#4A5568" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[0].IsSet, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.Not}}"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding KeyStates[0].Row.DisplayName}"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding KeyStates[0].DisplayValue}"
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3" Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                  Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                  CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[0].Row.GetKeyUrl}">
              <TextBlock Text="Get a key" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
            </buttons:CommonButton>
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="4" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="8" Margin="0,4,0,0">
              <TextBox x:Name="HfTokenInput" Grid.Column="1"
                       Text="{Binding KeyStates[0].PendingValue, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       PasswordChar="•" FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton x:Name="HfSaveButton" Grid.Column="2" Content="Save"
                                    FontSize="11" Padding="10,4" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                    Command="{Binding SaveKeyCommand}"
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[0]}"/>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- HF pricing note — one line under the HF row per spec -->
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding HfPricingNote}"
                   FontSize="11"
                   Foreground="#9AA3B1"
                   TextWrapping="Wrap"
                   Margin="0,-4,0,4"/>

        <!-- DeepSeek row (index 1) -->
        <Border BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="0,5">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="10"
                RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#5AD47D" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[1].IsSet}"/>
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#4A5568" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[1].IsSet, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.Not}}"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding KeyStates[1].Row.DisplayName}"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding KeyStates[1].DisplayValue}"
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3" Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                  Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                  CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[1].Row.GetKeyUrl}">
              <TextBlock Text="Get a key" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
            </buttons:CommonButton>
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="4" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="8" Margin="0,4,0,0">
              <TextBox Grid.Column="1"
                       Text="{Binding KeyStates[1].PendingValue, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       PasswordChar="•" FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="2" Content="Save" FontSize="11" Padding="10,4"
                                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                    Command="{Binding SaveKeyCommand}"
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[1]}"/>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Moonshot row (index 2) -->
        <Border BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="0,5">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="10"
                RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#5AD47D" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[2].IsSet}"/>
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#4A5568" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[2].IsSet, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.Not}}"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding KeyStates[2].Row.DisplayName}"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding KeyStates[2].DisplayValue}"
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3" Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                  Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                  CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[2].Row.GetKeyUrl}">
              <TextBlock Text="Get a key" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
            </buttons:CommonButton>
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="4" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="8" Margin="0,4,0,0">
              <TextBox Grid.Column="1"
                       Text="{Binding KeyStates[2].PendingValue, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       PasswordChar="•" FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="2" Content="Save" FontSize="11" Padding="10,4"
                                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                    Command="{Binding SaveKeyCommand}"
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[2]}"/>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Anthropic row (index 3) -->
        <Border BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="0,5">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="10"
                RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#5AD47D" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[3].IsSet}"/>
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#4A5568" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[3].IsSet, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.Not}}"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding KeyStates[3].Row.DisplayName}"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding KeyStates[3].DisplayValue}"
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3" Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                  Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                  CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[3].Row.GetKeyUrl}">
              <TextBlock Text="Get a key" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
            </buttons:CommonButton>
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="4" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="8" Margin="0,4,0,0">
              <TextBox Grid.Column="1"
                       Text="{Binding KeyStates[3].PendingValue, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       PasswordChar="•" FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="2" Content="Save" FontSize="11" Padding="10,4"
                                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                    Command="{Binding SaveKeyCommand}"
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[3]}"/>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- OpenAI row (index 4) -->
        <Border BorderBrush="#252A33" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="0,5">
          <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="10"
                RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#5AD47D" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[4].IsSet}"/>
            <Ellipse Width="9" Height="9" Fill="#4A5568" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                     IsVisible="{Binding KeyStates[4].IsSet, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.Not}}"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding KeyStates[4].Row.DisplayName}"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding KeyStates[4].DisplayValue}"
                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="3" Appearance="Hyperlink"
                                  VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                  Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
                                  CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[4].Row.GetKeyUrl}">
              <TextBlock Text="Get a key" FontSize="11" Foreground="#5575F2"/>
            </buttons:CommonButton>
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="4" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto"
                  ColumnSpacing="8" Margin="0,4,0,0">
              <TextBox Grid.Column="1"
                       Text="{Binding KeyStates[4].PendingValue, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       PasswordChar="•" FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
              <buttons:CommonButton Grid.Column="2" Content="Save" FontSize="11" Padding="10,4"
                                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                    Command="{Binding SaveKeyCommand}"
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding KeyStates[4]}"/>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Lit-tiers summary — one row per tier -->
        <Border Background="#12151C"
                BorderBrush="#252A33"
                BorderThickness="1"
                CornerRadius="4"
                Padding="4,4,4,4">
          <StackPanel Spacing="1">
            <TextBlock Text="Live Tiers" FontSize="9"
                       FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#7F8794"/>
            <TextBlock Text="Changes apply on the next backend start." FontSize="8"
                       Foreground="#9AA3B1" Margin="0,0,0,2"/>
            <ItemsControl x:Name="LitTierItems"
                          ItemsSource="{Binding LitTierRows}">
              <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                  <StackPanel Spacing="0"/>
                </ItemsPanelTemplate>
              </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
              <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                <DataTemplate x:DataType="vm:MainWindowViewModel+TierModelRow">
                  <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto"
                        ColumnSpacing="6">
                    <!-- Green dot when key is present -->
                    <Ellipse Width="8" Height="8" Fill="#5AD47D"
                             VerticalAlignment="Center"
                             IsVisible="{Binding KeyPresent}"/>
                    <!-- Gray dot when key is missing -->
                    <Ellipse Width="8" Height="8" Fill="#4A5568"
                             VerticalAlignment="Center"
                             IsVisible="{Binding KeyPresent, Converter={x:Static controls:BoolNotConverter.Instance}}"/>
                    <!-- Tier name (bold) -->
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Tier}"
                               FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#E7ECF3"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="9"/>
                    <!-- Model ComboBox (editable tiers only) -->
                    <ComboBox Grid.Column="2"
                              ItemsSource="{Binding SelectableModels}"
                              SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedModel, Mode=TwoWay}"
                              IsVisible="{Binding IsEditable}"
                              MinWidth="160"
                              FontSize="9"/>
                    <!-- Read-only model name (non-editable tiers) -->
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding SelectedModel}"
                               IsVisible="{Binding IsEditable, Converter={x:Static controls:BoolNotConverter.Instance}}"
                               Foreground="#7F8794" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="9"/>
                    <!-- Provider name (muted) -->
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding ProviderName}"
                               Foreground="#7F8794"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="9"/>
                  </Grid>
                </DataTemplate>
              </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
            </ItemsControl>
          </StackPanel>
        </Border>
        <!-- Obsidian bridge settings -->
        <controls:ObsidianSettings/>
      </StackPanel>
    </ScrollViewer>
  </Border>
</UserControl>
